article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent artists and his distinctive sample pack release.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his work with notable figures in the music industry such as DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
He has released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drums used across various productions.
His work is situated within the moombahton and dancehall genres, and he is associated with a range of similar artists including ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
While specific tracks and recent releases are not indexed, Noizekid's contributions continue to influence the Latin electronic music scene.
